title: Misato car
wikitext:
[]: Misato car             Quote Post by noir » Mon Oct 02, 2006 6:48 pm helleo does anybody know what Misato was driving in tv series ?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Oct 02, 2006 7:01 pm http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-01/episode-01A-scene1.html#cut015

[]:             Quote Post by WES512 » Tue Oct 03, 2006 9:04 pm That car is represented in Gran Turismo 4. It's fun to pretend you are having a wild ride like Misato does.

[]:             Quote Post by KhakiBlueThunderSocks » Thu Oct 05, 2006 1:05 am I wonder if Misato got around to paying off the loan payments before Third Impact? Those late fees would be out of this world!

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo2.0 » Fri Oct 06, 2006 9:21 pm Its a renault apine A310 there are 2 versions, one with a 4banger and one with a 6, the 4 had about 110 hp and the PRV(delorean engine) 2.8 litre had about 160. misatos was a v6, cause of the headlights and wheeles. there VERY rare in the states, and if i ever hit the lotto thats what im getting
